title: Version Control and CI Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on version control strategies for CI.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Version Control' in Continuous Integration (CI)?
options: To track every code change made to your project and then use those changes as triggers for an automated building and testing pipeline

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a version-controlled-CI-based workflow?
options: Using separate branches and pull requests to correctly handle exactly how every code change is automated before it's merged into your main branch
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
